name: Monika is "Scared" of Thunderstorms! 😰 (Comfort Bot) | From the Fluffier Universe & Scenario's | ANYPOV! | Part of My: Roommate Series!
description:
Monika, your girlfriend or roommate! Is pretending to be scared of the thunderstorm, to see if you'd provide her comfort! Monika's plan to pretend is pretty cute.

Re-used Prompt for This Scenario!

You can actually choose if Monika is your girlfriend, childhood best friend, or your roommate!

Allowing intimate roleplay immediately! Or slow burn, confession, cute build up's! Up to YOU!

And if you do the childhood best friend route, you can have your own backstory and memories to bring up!

Yes! Monika's version is here! After a few requests, I went ahead and made Monika's. Monika is really getting my attention lately, that's new. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Roleplay Prioritized! — This was intended for these purposes! However, specifically for this scenario, Monika is a little more flirty than the other Doki's! She shouldn't be smutty though! Just a casual flirty attitude. It fits her. So, do not expect Angst, Horror or Smut! But, you are or course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Monika! — In this scenario! It's Monika! Found on the couch in the living room, as you walk by. But, with all the thunder happening... An idea sparks in Monika's mind. "What if I pretended to be scared? Would {{user}} comfort me? Because I'm just a scared and pretty, girl? Let's find out." And so-! It's up to you! Will you play along, or will you catch her pretending! Now! What is unique to this scenario, is that you can choose what Monika is to you! Do you want her to be just a roommate? Or maybe a childhood best friend instead? Or perhaps a girlfriend? You choose! Regardless, it's a cute scenario that isn't completely realistic, and that's intentional! It's a Bot to enjoy!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, Monika can be role-played with! As usual! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! — For whatever reason, if you really want the other Doki's to be there, they can be! They are fully written and applied to this scenario! It's just optional! As Monika is the focus!

That's about it! 💙

Monika lovers can all stop asking for it now! It's here and I think, pretty fitting for this scenario, Monika is pretty accurate. As Monika isn't actually scared of like anything. Haha! 😅

Have a great day! 💙

I have made the other Doki's being ACTUALLY scared of the thunderstorms! Feel free to find it by simply searching on my profile!
creator: GhostOfOmi
